preconditions: Launch the WashTab SPA in a browser
Ensure the user is unauthenticated and has not signed in
Execute all scenarios in guest state without authenticating

testCases.title: Verify Home page loads successfully in guest state for an unauthenticated user
steps: Launch the application in a new browser session
Wait for the Home page to finish loading
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page loads successfully in guest state for an unauthenticated user and the guest-accessible Home controls are displayed without showing authenticated user indicators.

testCases.title: Verify all approved guest-state controls and shared Home shell controls are visible and enabled on Home page
steps: Observe the Home page guest-state controls
Verify the Person/Profile button is visible and enabled
Verify the Back button is visible and enabled
Verify the Notification button is visible and enabled
Verify the Home button is visible and enabled
Verify the Customer signup button is visible and enabled
Verify the Clean survey button is visible and enabled
Verify the Site survey button is visible and enabled
testCases.expectedResult: All approved guest-state controls and shared Home shell controls are visible, enabled, clickable, and available in the Home page guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Person/Profile button navigates from Home guest state to Login page or Login view
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home guest state to the Login page or Login view while remaining unauthenticated before login submission.

testCases.title: Verify Customer signup button navigates to customer-search page from Home guest state
steps: Observe the destination page or SPA view
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates from the Home guest state to the customer-search page and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify Clean survey button navigates to vehicle-survey page from Home guest state
steps: Observe the destination page or SPA view
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates from the Home guest state to the vehicle-survey page and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify Site survey button navigates to survey page from Home guest state
steps: Observe the destination page or SPA view
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates from the Home guest state to the survey page and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify guest-state execution remains unauthenticated after navigating to Login view from Person/Profile button
steps: Observe the Login page or Login view without entering credentials
Return to the Home page guest state using browser navigation or application navigation
testCases.expectedResult: The user remains unauthenticated throughout the navigation flow and returning to Home displays the same guest-state controls without any logged-in user indicators.

testCases.title: Verify Home button remains enabled and accessible in guest state
steps: Click the Home button while already on the Home page
Observe the page state after the click
testCases.expectedResult: The Home button remains enabled and the application stays on the Home guest state without displaying an error or changing to an authenticated state.

testCases.title: Verify Back button is visible and does not expose authenticated functionality in guest state
steps: Verify the Back button is visible and enabled
testCases.expectedResult: The Back button interaction does not expose authenticated-only functionality and the application remains within unauthenticated guest-state behavior.

testCases.title: Verify repeated clicks on Customer signup button do not create duplicate customer-search transitions
steps: Rapidly click the Customer signup button multiple times
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions cleanly to the customer-search page only once without duplicate navigation layers, duplicate requests, or UI instability.

testCases.title: Verify guest-state controls remain visible after returning to Home page from Customer signup flow
steps: Return to the Home page guest state using browser or application navigation
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page returns to the guest state with the Person/Profile, Back, Notification, Home, Customer signup, Clean survey, and Site survey buttons visible and enabled.

testCases.title: Verify guest-state controls remain visible after returning to Home page from Clean survey flow
steps: Return to the Home page guest state using browser or application navigation
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page returns to the guest state with all approved guest-state buttons visible and enabled and without authenticated user indicators.

testCases.title: Verify guest-state controls remain visible after returning to Home page from Site survey flow
steps: Return to the Home page guest state using browser or application navigation
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page returns to the guest state with all approved guest-state controls visible, enabled, and still operating in unauthenticated mode.
